name: A potential anti-aging probiotic: Lactobacillus paracasei JS-3 extends lifespan in Caenorhabditis elegans and modulates the gut microbiota in the elderly
short_name: L. paracasei JS-3 aging model study
summary: A 2026 study testing Lactobacillus paracasei JS-3 in C. elegans aging assays and in vitro fermentation of gut microbiota from elderly individuals.
